build.buildCommand: php -v && rm -rf vendor/composer && composer install --no-dev --no-progress && composer dump-autoload && npm run build && php artisan config:clear

deploy.startCommand: echo "APP_KEY=base64:kYSusrJyMWq0cudFydQ7Vxh3INHIxlHBDUL16SoCpOU=" > .env && php artisan migrate --force && php artisan serve --port=$PORT
